description: Compress analysis into a send-ready email using the interactive message compose tool
usage: write an email, draft a message, cold email, email to someone about, compose mail, launch email, send an email

recipient.description: Who receives this: cold-list, manager, ceo, client, team, investor, partner, customer

tone.description: Email tone: formal, direct, warm, bold, conversational

variants.description: Number of strategic variants to generate (1-3). Multiple variants offer different approaches, not just different tones.

findings.description: Upstream research or analysis findings from chained modules
